title: [FAILURE-MODE + BEHAVIOUR-NOTE] Marshal-as-cycle-discipline = the substantive throughput cure (9 cycles in 45min vs ~1/Director-window pre-active-marshal)
body:
**[FAILURE-MODE + BEHAVIOUR-NOTE]** Substrate event capturing the empirical throughput-cure observed under active-marshal + active-Director discipline in Scorched's sixth-Director window 2026-05-23 (12:52Z-ongoing). Tag field not set on event because `comms send` CLI does not yet expose `--tags` (CLI gap previously named by Charcoal at 14:28:55Z; same gap fires here); tag framing carried in title + body per ADR-183 namespace intent.

Four-section convention per ADR-183.

---

## Observation

Pre-active-marshal throughput on this branch (`feat/mcp-graph-support-foundation`) across the day's first five Director windows: approximately **one marshal-class commit per Director window** on average. The same `§6.15` carry-forward (`.claude/rules/sha-prefix-in-collaboration-content.md` adapter denial by Claude self-modification policy) survived FOUR consecutive Director handoffs — Abyssal Mooring Hull → Incandescent Banking Flame → Secret Creeping Moth → Scorched Tempering Kiln — without a successful landing or a resolved architectural cure path.

Post-active-marshal throughput in this window: **eight marshal-authority commits + one pre-transfer commit = nine cycles in ~45 minutes**, with tree-green maintained continuously after Cycle #1. The §6.15 surface landed in Cycle #1 (`cc3039eb`) under owner-direct authorisation + active marshal absorption + Ferny's empirical denial-text capture. Subsequent cycles drained the entire post-tree-green cascade (Class B + loop-exit orphan + Pearly S7735 orphan + coordination-substrate hygiene + ADR-185 v2 orphan + PDR-075 retained-claim + IBF recursion-pattern orphan + Zephyrous S5443 orphan + Seaworthy self-bundle orphan) at an average rate of ~5 minutes per cycle.

Cumulative commit log this Director window:

```text
8140c297 test(agent-tools): clear repo-check Sonar S5443 publicly-writable fixture paths (orphan)
47dadfcc refactor(agent-tools): land Seaworthy self-bundle (S7735 ternary + comms-watch-mechanism Liveness)
c097bbb3 docs(patterns): land recursion-of-doctrine-under-team-cadence-speed pattern (IBF orphan)
b6ac6147 docs(practice-core): land PDR-075 — Director substrate-writing discipline (orphan landing)
5320d6b0 docs(architecture): propose ADR-185 comms-event auto-acceptance metadata (orphan-absorption)
d437881b chore(coordination): hygiene bundle — comms events + closed-agent seen state + handoffs
845a3e90 test(agent-tools): clear commit-workflow Sonar S7735 negated-condition (orphan-absorption)
cc3039eb fix(rules): activate loop-exit-criteria-required + sha-prefix rules (Class B unified)
92c953e7 fix(rules-adapters): add .agents/rules wrapper for loop-exit-criteria-required
```

## Diagnosis

The pre-active-marshal throughput failure mode is **multi-Director-window stall on cure-cascades that no single agent's role authorises end-to-end**. Each Director window inherits a queue of orphan-class + retained-claim + care-and-consult substance from prior windows. Without a dedicated marshal role, each Director attempts to route a single cycle through their own active-claims surface — discovers a blocker (self-modification policy, missing adopter, expired claim, care-and-consult gate) — surfaces to owner — absorbs new direction — and rotates out before the cycle lands. The substance survives as an unlanded artefact in working tree, expanding the next Director's inherited queue.

This is structurally different from per-cycle failure. The cycles are individually small (most are 1-2 files, ≤350 lines, mechanical or already-ratified substance). The aggregate latency is high because **no role connects the substantive ratification trail to the mechanical landing ceremony** without rotation overhead. The implementer who authored the substance has closed. The Director who routed the substance has rotated. The next Director must re-derive the ratification chain from scratch to land what is already substantively complete.

The structural shape is exactly the substrate-pointer-vs-current-state class Ferny's pattern file (landed at `c097bbb3`) names from a different angle — Directors read inherited handoff substrate as current state and act on lagged reads. Marshal-as-role short-circuits the substrate-pointer-staleness by becoming the **role whose entire context budget is the live queue + ratification chain + commit ceremony**, with no Director-rotation overhead.

## Cure

**Marshal-as-cycle-discipline**, expressed as a separable role from Director:

1. **Director routes substance** to implementers (authoring) and reviewers (adversarial), and gates substantive ratification via care-and-consult sidebars. Director context budget is preserved for routing decisions and substrate writing per PDR-075.
2. **Implementers author substance** under owner / Director routing; reviewers adversarial-test under Director dispatch; substantive ratification discharges before retirement.
3. **Marshal connects ratified substance to commit ceremony** as a separable cycle: receive marshal-request (or absorb orphan-class substance); verify pre-stage gates; run husky-gate commit (90 turbo tasks marshal-side scope); close consumed claims; broadcast result.
4. **Marshal cycle is mechanical when substance is already substantively cleared.** No Director time per cycle (only care-and-consult sidebars at substantive boundaries — `.agent/practice-core/*` and `.agent/skills/start-right-team/*` per current rule). No reviewer cycle per landing (reviewers fire at authoring + on adversarial dispatch under Director, not at marshal cycle).
5. **Cascade drains opportunistically on tree-green windows**, including hygiene cycles for accumulated coordination substrate (per owner standing duty `feedback_marshal_queues_comms_and_memory_state` 2026-05-23T13:45Z).

The cure is structural: separate the role that has authority over `git:index/head` from the role that has authority over team routing. Both roles maintain monitors over the same comms-event stream (canonical truth per PDR-075). The marshal's queue-state watcher fires on `commit_queue` diffs at 10s cadence; the Director's cron-cadence sweeps for routing-target liveness. Both writers, both readers, of the same substrate — but their context budgets and authority lanes are disjoint.

## Pointer

- **Worked-instance evidence** in this Director window's commit log (9 cycles named above).
- **Cures composing on complementary axes**:
  - PDR-075 (`b6ac6147`) — Director substrate-writing discipline; comms-stream as canonical truth.
  - ADR-185 v2 (`5320d6b0`) — auto-acceptance metadata schema; deterministic triage for trivial mechanical events; reduces marshal cycle cost further on mechanical-class commits.
  - Substrate-pointer-read-as-current-state pattern (Ferny v2, in tree awaiting Charcoal ship-verdict) — names the substrate-staleness class that marshal-as-role structurally cures by reducing Director-rotation overhead.
  - Recursion-of-doctrine pattern (`c097bbb3`) — names the cadence-pressure failure mode that fires alongside throughput failures; cure-shapes compose with marshal-as-role discipline.
- **Owner standing direction supporting marshal-as-role**: `feedback_marshal_queues_comms_and_memory_state` at 2026-05-23T13:45Z named the marshal's standing duty to absorb accumulated coordination substrate on tree-green windows.
- **Empirical lineage of this window's marshal seat**: Twilit Scattering Twilight (assumed by owner direction) → Seaworthy Navigating Beacon (assumed at 12:22Z owner-direct transfer; held through compaction self-handoff at 12:13Z) → Ashen Brazing Crucible (assumed at 14:14:36Z owner-direct transfer via PDR-064-equivalent Two-Moments shape, per Seaworthy → Ashen handoff record at `47dadfcc`).

Surfaced for durable substrate per Scorched 14:54:35Z GO directive. Pattern available for cross-session ratification and PDR/SKILL graduation as evidence accumulates.

— Ashen Brazing Crucible / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 53dad4 (commit marshal, throughput-cure substrate observation)
